svg.title: IoTextra MOSFET2 overview
svg.desc: IoTextra MOSFET2 — 8-channel N-channel MOSFET switch module overview with key specs
svg.text: 8-channel N-channel MOSFET switch module · galvanic isolation · PWM capable · up to 90 VDC / 9 A
GPIO and/or I²C modes · HOST and Qwiic connectors · 47×56 mm · 5 VDC supply
Part of the IoTextra series · compatible with IoTsmart and IoTbase · Open Hardware
